reason: Check implementation preserves RVV-first authority chain and does not move route, dtype, operation, or evidence authority into metadata/common code.
Check selected-boundary-only route construction, direct route-entry diagnostic-only status, provider construction, and segment2 route-family wording remain aligned.
Check tcrv.exec remains an execution envelope and does not absorb RVV compute or route authority.
Check common EmitC remains a neutral consumer of provider-built TCRVEmitCLowerableRoute.
Verify public production API no longer exposes route-entry consumer fields, segment2 route-entry registries, route-entry variant queries, or WithVLOp-returning direct helper.
Verify owner registry is selected-body-only, direct-route diagnostic helper cannot materialize routes, and removed public route-entry APIs have no implementation remnants.
Verify production emission-plan and EmitC route construction still require selected lowering-boundary materialization before provider facts.
Verify route planning diagnostics use selected-body route-family terminology rather than route-entry support wording.
Verify provider construction consumes realized typed tcrv_rvv facts and does not become a realization fallback.
Verify focused C++ coverage matches removed APIs and still proves selected-boundary-only fail-closed diagnostics and provider preconditions.
Verify direct pre-realized CLI remains fail-closed and selected-boundary dry-runs keep route_entry_realization false if script is touched or used as evidence.
